final_prompt: Use case: logo-brand; Asset type: app icon for Orbwalker; Primary request: square production candidate application icon for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Subject: a single iconic glowing elemental orb held in a small crescent of dark fantasy stone and gold, hinting at dungeon treasure and match-3 magic. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game app icon, strong silhouette, high contrast, readable at small mobile size. Composition/framing: centered square icon, no text, no border text, no UI. Lighting/mood: premium magical glow, adventurous fantasy. Color palette: gold frame accents, dark stone, multicolor elemental orb core. Constraints: no readable text, no letters, no logo wordmark, no watermark, no copyrighted characters, no casino imagery, no gore, no tiny details that disappear at app-icon size.
